headline: ICE Benchmark Administration Launches ICE Swap Rate® Inflation Swap Benchmarks in GBP and EUR
summary: LONDON, June 05, 2026--Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE:ICE), one of the world's leading providers of financial market technology and data powering global capital markets, today announced that ICE Benchmark Administration Limited (IBA), a leading administrator of regulated benchmarks, has launched two new ICE Swap Rate® Inflation Swap benchmarks.
